svg.title: CareerGraph — 2nd and 3rd degree referral path visualisation
svg.desc: Shows how CareerGraph surfaces hidden referral paths from a user node through 1st, 2nd, and 3rd degree connections to a target company job opportunity.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does CareerGraph ingest my LinkedIn data?')
sendPrompt('What is a 1st degree connection in CareerGraph?')
